    "check_unit_economics_consistent": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "ACV $18K × customers = revenue checks out, headcount × $155K avg cost aligns with expenses"},

    "check_three_statements": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Cash flow statement missing - only P&L and balance sheet present"},

    "check_full_horizon": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Full 3-year horizon covered across all statements and projections"},

    "check_margins_plausible": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Gross margin 80% reasonable for SaaS, operating margins -5% to 0.5% typical for growth stage"},
    "check_headcount_math": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "84 employees × $155K avg = $13M vs total OpEx $7M (includes non-payroll costs)"},
    "check_tax_rate": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "No tax provision applied despite positive Y3 pre-tax income of $74K"},
    "check_periods_labeled": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Clear period labels Y0, Y1, Y2, Y3 throughout all statements"},
    "check_units_specified": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Units clearly specified as ($000s) in financial statements"},
    "check_inputs_vs_outputs": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Clear distinction between assumption inputs and calculated outputs in model structure"}

  "rubric": {
